<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Dumper; use Symfony\Component\Translation\MessageCatalogue; /** * PhpFileDumper generates PHP files from a message catalogue. * * @author Michel Salib <michelsalib@hotmail.com> */ class PhpFileDumper extends FileDumper { public function formatCatalogue(MessageCatalogue $messages, string $domain, array $options = []): string { return "<?php\n\nreturn ".var_export($messages->all($domain), true).";\n"; } protected function getExtension(): string { return 'php'; } }
